title: The Grand Review
storySnippet: The fortress guardian tests your mastery of every word you have learned on your journey so far.

data.sentenceContext: The teacher asked the class to write the full word instead of the abbreviation.
They dreamed of sailing the Mediterranean and visiting ancient ports.
The prize-winning chrysanthemum was the largest flower at the harvest fair.
He took a surreptitious peek at the answer sheet when the teacher turned away.
Years of correspondence between the two scholars filled an entire bookshelf.
Good historical fiction relies on verisimilitude to transport readers to another era.
Many considered it sacrilegious to disturb the ancient burial ground.
Her effervescent personality brightened every room she entered.

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: The ___ network of caves stretched for miles beneath the mountain.
data.hint: Like a maze; extremely complex and winding

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: The ___ ruler demanded absolute obedience from everyone in the land.
data.hint: Ruling with cruel and absolute power

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: Without rain, the soil will ___ and the crops will fail.
data.hint: To remove all moisture; to dry out completely

exercises.prompt: Complete the sentence with the correct word.

data.sentence: The ___ celebration included fireworks, feasts, and golden decorations.
data.hint: Exceeding what is reasonable; lavish and costly
